properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! Now to Thy saints appear! Oh, speak with power to every soul, And let Thy people hear!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! While here to Thee we bow; Descend, O gracious Lord, descend! Oh, come, and bless us now!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! And every soul inspire; Oh, kindle in each heart, we pray, The Pentecostal fire!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! Exalt Thy precious name! And may Thy love in every heart Be kindled to a flame!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! And bless to all Thy Word! And may its pure and sacred truth In living faith be heard!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! And make Thy servants bold; Convict of sin and work once more As in the days of old.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Revive Thy work, O Lord! Give Pentecostal showers! Be Thine the glory, Thine alone! The blessing, Lord, be ours!
